author: Stev
text: James's South Africa picks up 2 red cards in the very first game of the tournament. Absolute scenes.

author: Rob
text: Mexico. T2. 2 pts. Day 1. You're welcome.

author: Teddy
text: Canada hangs SIX on Joe's Qatar. T3 x a six-spot. +4.5 on the day. Remember me? I'm back.

author: Joe
text: Qatar shipping six. I've seen enough. Anyway, congrats Teddy, truly thrilled for you.

author: James
text: Caught Jim at 9.5 and didn't even need a headline to do it. Quietly assembling. The lead is next.

author: Jim
text: Co-leader is a funny way to spell second, James. Still my table.
